mapper.insert: insert into product_distribution_operation_log( batch_no, operation_type, owner_type, spu_id, sku_id, system_spu_code, system_sku_code, seller_id, seller_name, before_sales_status, after_sales_status, before_control_status, after_control_status, before_sale_price, after_sale_price, currency_code, reason, change_summary, diff_json, operator_name, operation_time, operation_source, remark ) values ( #{batchNo}, #{operationType}, #{ownerType}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{systemSpuCode}, #{systemSkuCode}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerName}, #{beforeSalesStatus}, #{afterSalesStatus}, #{beforeControlStatus}, #{afterControlStatus}, #{beforeSalePrice}, #{afterSalePrice}, #{currencyCode}, #{reason}, #{changeSummary}, #{diffJson}, #{operatorName}, sysdate(), #{operationSource}, #{remark} )
